offer: For Etsy sellers processing 5–15 orders/month, low stock levels cause missed sales opportunities. We provide alerts instead of manual inventory tracking.
problem: Stock levels fall below thresholds, causing missed sales opportunities.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for Etsy sellers
Indie Hackers discussions on inventory management
DM outreach to Etsy sellers with demo video
Community forums for Etsy seller tools
try_it: Let users try Threshold alerts and Manual inventory input on 1-3 items

Short demo video of the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
